name: Barbell Deadlift (Conventional)
setup: Bar over mid-foot, ~1 inch from shins
Feet hip-width apart, toes slightly out
Bend at hips and knees, grip bar shoulder-width
Mixed grip or hook grip for heavy loads
Back neutral, chest up, lats engaged
execution: Take slack out of bar (pull bar slightly)
Drive through floor, pushing floor away
Bar stays in contact with legs throughout
Lock out at top: hips forward, glutes squeezed, shoulders back
Lower under control, hinging at hips first
common_mistakes: Bouncing bar off floor (no dead stop)
cues: Bar over mid-foot, drag up shins
Neutral neck (pick a spot 12 ft ahead on floor)
Brace core like you're about to be punched
